Introduction.heading: Begin your forever in a space uniquely yours
Introduction.description: De novo is a luxury canvas, transforming entirely to reflect your distinct love story. Every detail, from the architectural elements to the smallest decorative accents, is thoughtfully curated to bring your vision to life.

items.title: Bespoke Interiors
items.description: Every element is customizable. From wall treatments to lighting design, we create the environment you envision down to the finest detail.

items.title: Guest Capacity
items.description: Our venue accommodates up to 500 guests indoors and 500 guests in our external garden spaces, providing ample room for celebrations of any scale.

items.title: Professional Lighting & Sound
items.description: We provide professional-grade lighting and sound systems to ensure your celebration looks and sounds extraordinary.

items.title: Everything the Bride Needs
items.description: From preparation suites to final send-off, everything the bride needs is available in one place — no need to travel between locations.

Promise.subtitle: Our Commitment
Promise.heading: The De novo Promise
Promise.description: When you choose De novo, you're choosing a partner dedicated to making your celebration extraordinary.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality
items.description: Every detail, from linens to lighting, is curated with meticulous attention to ensure perfection.

items.title: Dedicated Team
items.description: Your personal event coordinator guides you through every step, from first visit to final dance.

items.title: Complete Customization
items.description: No two celebrations are alike. We transform our spaces to reflect your unique vision.

items.title: Exclusive Privacy
items.description: Your celebration is yours alone. Our estate offers complete seclusion for your special day.

items.title: Timeless Memories
items.description: We create moments that become cherished memories, captured in photographs and hearts forever.

Journey.subtitle: Your Journey
Journey.heading: The Path to Your Perfect Day
Journey.description: From your first visit to your final dance, we guide you through every moment with care and expertise.

items.title: Initial Consultation
items.description: Begin your journey with a personal tour and design consultation. We'll explore your vision and discuss how our spaces can transform to tell your story.

items.title: Design Discovery
items.description: Our design team creates custom renderings and material boards tailored to your aesthetic. Every detail is considered, from color palettes to furniture selection.

items.title: Vendor Coordination
items.description: Connect with trusted local vendors — from decorators and henna artists to sound and lighting teams. We coordinate schedules and ensure seamless collaboration.

items.title: Final Details
items.description: In the weeks leading to your celebration, we finalize every element. Vendor coordination, timeline refinement, and a final walk-through ensure perfection.

items.title: Start Early
items.description: Begin planning 6-12 months ahead for prime dates. This allows time for venue visits, vendor selection, and design development.

items.title: Define Your Vision
items.description: Create a mood board with colors, textures, and styles that resonate with you. This guides all design decisions.

items.title: Prioritize Guest Experience
items.description: Consider the flow of your celebration. Comfortable seating, ambient lighting, and thoughtful details create lasting memories.

items.title: Trust Your Team
items.description: Lean on your venue and vendors. Their expertise transforms challenges into seamless moments you'll cherish forever.

items.names: Grace & Gold Events, Love Story Designs

items.question: How far in advance should we book De novo?
items.answer: We recommend booking 6-12 months in advance for prime dates, especially during our peak season (May-October). However, we occasionally have last-minute availability, so don't hesitate to inquire regardless of your timeline.

items.question: What is included in the venue rental?
items.answer: Our comprehensive package includes exclusive use of all venue spaces, bespoke interior customization, on-site event coordination, catering by our Michelin-caliber culinary team, and premium bar service. Every detail is tailored to your vision.

items.question: Can we bring our own vendors?
items.answer: While we have a curated network of preferred vendors who understand our space and standards, we welcome your preferred vendors. We'll work closely with them to ensure seamless integration with our venue and services.

items.question: What is the capacity for ceremonies and receptions?
items.answer: Our spaces accommodate intimate gatherings of 50 guests to grand celebrations of up to 1000.  Ballroom seats 500. Our Garden Terrace is perfect for 250 guests.

items.question: How does the customization process work?
items.answer: Your journey begins with a design consultation where we explore your vision. Our team then creates detailed renderings and material samples. We handle everything from floral design to custom furniture, ensuring every element reflects your unique love story.
